sub_modules.conv1d_window_next: Combinational next-state generator for the streaming shift-register stencil window. It inserts the current input sample at the newest tap and shifts older taps down the window when valid_in is asserted.
sub_modules.conv1d_coeff_bank: Combinational default coefficient provider. It emits packed signed coefficients for supported 3-, 5-, and 7-tap kernels, including the 5-tap [2, 8, 12, 8, 2] kernel used by the supplied README.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate datapath. It multiplies the packed window samples by sign-extended packed coefficients and produces a widened signed accumulation result.
sub_modules.conv1d_output_cast: Combinational output-width adapter. It truncates the widened accumulator result to the required DATA_W+GAIN_W output width.
